issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent attacking), not 'OnAttacked' (being attacked). 'On Your Opponent's Attack' means when opponent initiates attack.
Missing cost requirement: must rest 2 of your own DON!! cards as payment. Condition should check 'HasAttachedDon' >= 2 or equivalent resource check.
Missing 'OncePerTurn' enforcement in the effect. DSL should include turn-limiting mechanism.
Target scope incomplete: 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with 'maxCost:4' is correct but missing 'maxSelect':1 to enforce 'up to 1' limitation.
